---
title: "Title"
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false

document_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(
	basename(knitr::current_input())
)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	fig.path = file.path("figures", document_name, "")
)

set.seed(as.numeric(Sys.Date()))

source(here::here("code", "functions", "plotting.R"))
ggplot2::theme_set(theme_sbe())
```
